title: AI One Platform — Context and Control for Enterprise AI
title_zh: AI One平台—企业AI的上下文和控制
full_text:
AI One Platform — Context and Control for Enterprise AI
Product
Outcomes
Insights
About
Read our paper
Governed execution for enterprise AI
Governed execution for enterprise AI
Governed execution for enterprise AI
ContextOne connects the business context, data sources, deterministic controls, and governed memory required to complete real work.
A composable lightweight software layer that improves the accuracy, reliability, and repeatability of any agent, model, or agentic framework.
ContextOne connects the business context, data sources, deterministic controls, and governed memory required to complete real work.
A composable lightweight software layer that improves the accuracy, reliability, and repeatability of any agent, model, or agentic framework.
Read our paper
Business context, connected
Give agents the context of the work.
ContextOne connects business terms, source data, system relationships, policies, and workflow logic so agents can operate from approved context instead of isolated prompts or disconnected records.
ContextOne connects business terms, source data, system relationships, policies, and workflow logic so agents can operate from approved context instead of isolated prompts or disconnected records.
Explore business context
Execution controls
Govern what AI can see and do.
Permissions, policies, approved actions, evaluation gates, lineage, and human oversight run inside the workflow, making AI-enabled work more predictable, auditable, and controlled.
Permissions, policies, approved actions, evaluation gates, lineage, and human oversight run inside the workflow, making AI-enabled work more predictable, auditable, and controlled.
Explore execution controls
Governed memory
Carry learning from one workflow to the next.
ContextOne captures outcomes, corrections, exceptions, durable facts, and successful paths as governed memory, so each workflow can improve future execution without losing control.
ContextOne captures outcomes, corrections, exceptions, durable facts, and successful paths as governed memory, so each workflow can improve future execution without losing control.
Explore governed memory
Existing systems
Work across the stack you already have.
ContextOne connects to enterprise data, documents, APIs, tools, and workflow systems already in place, helping teams automate real work without migration or rebuilds.
ContextOne connects to enterprise data, documents, APIs, tools, and workflow systems already in place, helping teams automate real work without migration or rebuilds.
Start without migrating
ContextOne Composable Components
01
Agent Harness Deterministic execution delivered at scale.
Stateless runtime with a governed loop. 100K+ concurrent agents with minimal memory footprint.
01
AI Data Fabric Activate your data where it lives today.
01
AI Data Fabric Activate your data where it lives today.
02
Agent Ontology Your organization, indexed for agents.
Auto-populated graph of business terms, skills, tools, and data. With temporal validity and access control.
02
Agent Ontology Your organization, indexed for agents.
02
Agent Ontology Your organization, indexed for agents.
03
Memory Engine Learn once, apply in a feedback loop.
Three learning pipelines: episodic, procedural, semantic. The first time an SME handles an exception is the last.
04
Memory Engine Learn once, apply in a feedback loop.
04
Memory Engine Learn once, apply in a feedback loop.
04
AI Data Fabric Activate your data where it lives today.
Zero-copy, in-place access across heterogeneous systems. Entity resolution across disparate source .
03
Agent Harness Deterministic execution delivered at scale.
03
Agent Harness Deterministic execution delivered at scale.
05
Control Plane Govern once, apply everywhere safely.
ABAC access control, cryptographic audit, formal logic verification, end-to-end data lineage.
05
Control Plane Govern once, apply everywhere safely.
05
Control Plane Govern once, apply everywhere safely.
Start with the workflow that matters most.
Start with the workflow that matters most.
